summary: WebSocket Reconnect Loop Bug Fix Testing completed. Found and fixed a bug where the 'Reconnecting...' banner was showing for Pro users after login due to race condition in onclose handler. Also fixed infinite reconnect loop for Free users. All 9 backend tests pass, all 4 frontend UI tests pass.
passed_tests: Unauthenticated user on /leaderboard — NO reconnecting banner visible
Unauthenticated user on /dashboard — NO reconnecting banner visible
Unauthenticated user on / (homepage) — NO reconnecting banner visible
Demo mode (?demo=true) on /leaderboard — NO reconnecting banner, WS connected
Demo mode on /alerts — NO reconnecting banner, alerts streaming
Authenticated Pro user — WS connects, no reconnecting banner (after fix)
Authenticated Free user — upgrade prompt, no infinite reconnect loop (after fix)
Pro user profile returns correct tier
Free user profile returns correct tier

bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: Reconnecting banner showing for Pro users after login
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: In useStrategyAlerts.js onclose handler, setConnected(false) was called BEFORE checking for intentional close (code 1000). When effect cleanup ran, it closed WS with code 1000, which set connected=false, causing banner to show briefly.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Moved setConnected(false) AFTER the early return for code 1000 (intentional close)

bugs_found_and_fixed.bug: Infinite reconnect loop for Free users
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: When Free user received code 4003 (upgrade required), the effect would re-run due to state changes, creating new WS connections that would also get rejected.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added upgradeRequiredRef to track upgrade state and prevent reconnection. Also set connected=null instead of false for code 4003 to avoid showing reconnecting banner.

context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket reconnect loop bug has been fixed. Key changes in useStrategyAlerts.js: (1) setConnected(false) now only called for unexpected closes, not intentional closes (code 1000), (2) Added upgradeRequiredRef to prevent infinite reconnect for free users, (3) Free users get connected=null instead of false when upgrade required. The MobileNetworkBanner only shows 'Reconnecting...' when wsConnected===false, so null state skips the banner.

websocket_reconnect_fix.demo_mode: WS connects successfully, no reconnecting banner
websocket_reconnect_fix.pro_user: WS connects, no reconnecting banner after login
websocket_reconnect_fix.free_user: Upgrade prompt shown, no infinite reconnect loop
